ns1:revision.ns1:text:
'''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.6 (3.10.0-957.1.3.el7) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 6.10 (2.6.32-754.10.1.el6) *RHEL 7.6 (3.10.0-957.1.3.el7) *SLES12 SP3 (4.4.162-94.69) *Ubuntu 16.04 (4.4.0-142) '''Recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
*v1.44.5.wc1 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.9.X == Issues fixed between 2.10.6 and 2.10.7 == ''' Improvement ''' * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8402 LU-8402]] - OBD_CONNECT_* flags retirement * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8727 LU-8727]] - Remove skip records from config file * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9810 LU-9810]] - Melanox OFED 4.1 support * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10507 LU-10507]] - Use {save,restore}_layout() to save and restore layout in test cases * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10516 LU-10516]] - Update recommended e2fsprogs version * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11010 LU-11010]] - Remove call to ‘return’ after call to ‘skip’ in Lustre test suites * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11244 LU-11244]] - 'make debs' mistakenly ignores IB options * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11736 LU-11736]] - Do not apply bulk IO tuning on MDT or MGT devices * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11739 LU-11739]] - Don't inherit default layout from root for new subdirectories ''' Bug ''' * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-4939 LU-4939]] - Need to be able to sanely query and change MGS configuration information * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-6632 LU-6632]] - lctl replace_nids should remove SKIP records, not EXCLUDE ones * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-7558 LU-7558]] - niobuf.c:721:ptl_send_rpc() LASSERT(AT_OFF || imp_state != LUSTRE_IMP_FULL || imp_msghdr_flags & MSGHDR_AT_SUPPORT ...) * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-7631 LU-7631]] - conf-sanity test_82a: getstripe -c wrong: found 2, expected 3 * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-7988 LU-7988]] - HSM: high lock contention for cdt_llog_lock * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8895 LU-8895]] - server grants clients with more grants that the clients ask * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8999 LU-8999]] - sanity-quota test_38: skipped id entries * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9230 LU-9230]] - soft lockup on v2.9 Lustre clients (ldlm?) * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9474 LU-9474]] - tests: register traps in a correct order * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9706 LU-9706]] - conf-sanity test_53a: MDS soft lockup - CPU#0 stuck for 22s in osd_trans_commit_cb() * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9785 LU-9785]] - lov_io_slice_init()) ASSERTION( obj->lo_lsm != ((void *)0) ) failed * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9874 LU-9874]] - simplify project transfer codes * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9906 LU-9906]] - Allow Lustre page dropping to use pagevec_release * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10055 LU-10055]] - mds_fill_lvbo() message spew on MDS console * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10124 LU-10124]] - lnetctl: lnetctl import --add not importing peers corectly * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10143 LU-10143]] - LBUG dt_object.h:2166:dt_declare_record_write * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10213 LU-10213]] - o2iblnd: Potential discrepancy when allocating qp * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10461 LU-10461]] - sanity 77c failure due to variables called in cleanup routine are out of scope * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10527 LU-10527]] - LustreError: 7830:0:(llog_cat.c:313:llog_cat_current_log()) ASSERTION( llh ) * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10565 LU-10565]] - Handle some small features in upstream * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10612 LU-10612]] - replay-single test_48 defect causes test failure due to error: No space left on device * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10629 LU-10629]] - Cannot clear a default OST pool from root * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10776 LU-10776]] - Large grant requests still don't work, resulting in small write RPCs * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10818 LU-10818]] - mds-survey test 2 hangs with “ASSERTION( ma->ma_need & (MA_LOV | MA_LMV) ) failed” * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10900 LU-10900]] - wrong assertion in osd_transfer_project() * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10945 LU-10945]] - Race between sending bl ast and lock cancel * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10985 LU-10985]] - Attempting to send a mkdir create intents crashes server * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10986 LU-10986]] - make lfs project tolerant errors * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11006 LU-11006]] - lnetctl export creates "peer" root with no peer * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11049 LU-11049]] - lgss-sk: incorrect 'fsname' and 'nodemap' string handling * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11056 LU-11056]] - OSS can't connect to MDS after hard reboot * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11068 LU-11068]] - "not a valid identifier" in lbuild caused by an extra space * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11130 LU-11130]] - cross-target rename creates invalid symlink inodes * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11156 LU-11156]] - scrub treat project quota inode as IGIF last_id * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11158 LU-11158]] - PFL component instantiation is not replayed properly * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11186 LU-11186]] - Cannot create files on MDT1, ofd_precreate_objects()) snx11205-OST0001:0xffffffdd:11811161088 hit the OBIF_MAX_OID (1<<32)! * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11187 LU-11187]] - MMP updated sometimes failes T10PI checks * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11195 LU-11195]] - LBUG: (lod_lov.c:633:lod_free_comp_buffer()) ASSERTION( entry->llc_stripe == ((void *)0) ) * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11196 LU-11196]] - conf-sanity test_103: Fail to cleanup the env * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11461 LU-11461]] - Lustre resource agent fails with symlink target * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11481 LU-11481]] - corrupt directory * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11536 LU-11536]] - ofd_create_hdl returns 0 instead of ENOSPC causing ESTALE on MDS * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11567 LU-11567]] - llog_reader does not show index of changelog records * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11579 LU-11579]] - cl_file_inode_init()) ASSERTION(inode->i_state & (1 << 3) ) failed: * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11582 LU-11582]] - LBUG: ASSERTION( inode->i_data.nrpages == 0 ) failed * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11605 LU-11605]] - create_count stuck in 0 after changeing max_create_count to 0 and back 20 000 * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11620 LU-11620]] - BUG: sleeping function called from invalid context at mm/slub.c:940 * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11625 LU-11625]] - ls -l returns "ls: cannot access Invalid argument" * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11647 LU-11647]] - niobuf.c:330:ptlrpc_register_bulk()) ASSERTION( desc->bd_md_count == 0 ) failed: * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11652 LU-11652]] - kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.162-94.69.2] * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11658 LU-11658]] - The cl_cache may be uninitialized while osc is activating * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11720 LU-11720]] - SRPM unnecessarily tied to kernel version * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11723 LU-11723]] - kernel update [RHEL7.6 3.10.0-957.1.3.el7] * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11737 LU-11737]] - LustreError: 11060:0:(osd_handler.c:3985:osd_xattr_set()) ASSERTION( handle ) failed: * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11757 LU-11757]] - lfs mkdir: Cannot allocate memory * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11783 LU-11783]] - lustre/lustre_user.h is deprecated too soon * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11790 LU-11790]] - ext4: include terminating u32 in size of xattr entries when expanding inodes * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11870 LU-11870]] - kernel update [RHEL6.10 2.6.32-754.10.1.el6] * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11943 LU-11943]] - many input/output error after soak running for couple of hours * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11947 LU-11947]] - Regression caused by LU-11461 * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12065 LU-12065]] - Client got evicted when lock callback timer expired on OSS * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12073 LU-12073]] - conf-sanity test 123aa hangs ''' Task ''' * [[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11689 LU-11689]] - lfs project should proceed all dirs if hit errors [[Category:Releases]]
